'''Calipsa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Calipsa Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. From [[Realspace/Legends|space]], it was a dull, brown, almost lifeless world. Calipsa was a brown world of little vegetation, rich in natural ores. It was dominated by [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations which caused much air pollution and hazy air, not entirely suitable for [[Human/Legends|Human]] consumption. The raw materials mined from the systems of the Calipsa Province were shipped to Calipsa where they were processed into alloys for export. One of its few untouched wildernesses was the [[Crystal Forest (Calipsa)|Crystal Forest]].
